_comment: Gate MLS test vectors — validated by test_mls_vectors.py

gate_compose_decrypt_round_trip.description: Compose a gate message, decrypt with the same identity, verify plaintext round-trips
gate_compose_decrypt_round_trip.label: scribe

gate_compose_decrypt_with_reply_to.description: Compose with reply_to, verify hidden reply_to survives encrypt/decrypt

gate_two_persona_cross_decrypt.description: Two personas in same gate can decrypt each other's messages

gate_member_add_epoch_advance.description: Adding a member advances the epoch; new member can decrypt post-add messages

gate_member_remove_epoch_advance.description: Removing a member advances the epoch; removed member cannot decrypt post-remove messages

gate_rekey_epoch_advance.description: Explicit rekey (without member change) advances epoch
gate_rekey_epoch_advance.label: operator

gate_export_import_state.description: Export gate state snapshot, verify opaque blob contains no plaintext
gate_export_import_state.label: scribe

gate_chain_plaintext_stamp.description: Decrypt stamps local plaintext on hashchain; lookup returns it without re-decrypting
gate_chain_plaintext_stamp.label: stamper

gate_envelope_policy_recovery.description: When envelope_policy=envelope_recovery, gate_envelope field is populated for cross-node decrypt
gate_envelope_policy_recovery.label: sender
